Uses of Class
common.binary.ByteArrayReader

  • Packages that use ByteArrayReader 
    Package Description
    tif.tagspecs  

    • Uses of ByteArrayReader in tif.tagspecs

      Methods in tif.tagspecs with parameters of type ByteArrayReader 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private static java.lang.String PhotoshopManager.readUnicodeString(ByteArrayReader reader)
      Reads a UTF-16BE encoded string prefixed by its character count.
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateAlphaChannelNames(ByteArrayReader reader, int dataSize, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Alpha Channel Names (0x03EE).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateColorHalftoningInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses the Colour Halftoning Information Image Resource Block (0x03F5) by decoding Photoshop's 18-byte fixed-point channel structure, following the parsing logic used by Phil Harvey's ExifTool.
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateColorTransferFunctions(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Color Transfer Functions (0x03F8).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateGlobalAltitude(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses the global lighting altitude (0x0419).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateGlobalAngle(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses the global lighting angle (0x040D).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateGridGuidesInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Grid and Guides information (0x0408).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePixelAspectRatio(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses pixel aspect ratio information (0x0428).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintFlags(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses the legacy 9-byte Print Flags resource (0x03F3).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintFlagsInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses print flag information (0x2710).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintPositionFallback(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses legacy print position information (0x041C).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintScaleFallback(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses legacy print scale information (0x041D).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintScaleInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Photoshop print scale information (0x0426).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translatePrintStyleFallback(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses legacy print style information (0x041B).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateQuickMaskInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Quick Mask Information (0x03FE).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateResolutionInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Photoshop resolution information (0x03ED).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateSlicesInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses slice information (0x041A).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateThumbnailInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Photoshop thumbnail information (0x0409 and 0x040C).
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateURL(ByteArrayReader reader, short resID, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses URL Information (0x040B) and URL List (0x041E) resources.
      private static void PhotoshopManager.translateVersionInfo(ByteArrayReader reader, PropertyDisplay display)
      Parses Photoshop version information (0x0421).
